title: 雨天窗景（cozy 室內視角）
style_note: 溫暖室內看向雨窗，柔焦、電影感、寫實偏繪畫質感
negative_prompt: text, watermark, logo, people, hands, blurry mess, deformed, low quality, jpeg artifacts
prompts: rain drops on a window pane at dusk, warm bokeh city lights outside, cozy interior windowsill with a steaming mug, cinematic soft light, photorealistic, moody, vertical composition
close-up of raindrops sliding down glass, blurred warm lamp glow behind, shallow depth of field, cinematic, photorealistic, calm atmosphere
rainy window with a small potted plant on the windowsill, soft grey-blue daylight, gentle reflections, photorealistic, tranquil, vertical composition
wet window glass with streaks of rain, out-of-focus street lights in blue hour, warm interior reflection, cinematic film still, photorealistic
cozy reading nook by a rainy window, open book and blanket, warm lamp light, rain streaks on glass, cinematic, photorealistic, vertical composition
raindrops racing down a dark window at night, golden bokeh from distant traffic, quiet mood, photorealistic, cinematic lighting
